zh.lifeSummary: Alice de Odyngseles是John De Odyngseles的女兒，於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可卡文迪什。她於大約1355年與Sir John Cavendish在英國英格蘭素福爾可卡文迪什結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1381年在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪格麗特 洛斯賀波利 煙雨 聖 克里斯托弗 勒 斯托可斯 安德 聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 艾可昌。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Odyngseles was born about 1330, in Cavendish, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John De Odyngseles. She married Sir John Cavendish about 1355, in Cavendish, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1381, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Odyngselesは約1330年にイギリスイギリススフォルクカベンディッシュでJohn De Odyngselesの娘として生まれた。約1355年にイギリスイギリススフォルクカベンディッシュでSir John Cavendishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1381年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト マーガレット ロスブリー ウィス スト チリストフエル ル ストクス アンド スト バーソロメウ ビー ス エクスチャンッジにて埋葬された。

ko.St Margaret Lothbury, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 마거릿 로스버이 위스 스트 크리스토퍼 일 스톡스 앤드 스트 바토롬w 비 테 스창
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Odyngseles(은)는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 카븐디시에서 John De Odyngseles의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 카븐디시에서 Sir John Cavendish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 마거릿 로스버이 위스 스트 크리스토퍼 일 스톡스 앤드 스트 바토롬w 비 테 스창에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice de Odyngseles родилась около 1330 г. в местности кавендиш, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John De Odyngseles. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cavendish около 1355 г. в местности кавендиш, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1381 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности ст маргарет лотбури вит ст кристофир л стоккс анд ст бартоломю би т эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
